summary: Testing of new LeafCheck features completed successfully. Backend: 37/37 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working - tabbed plant detail, editable care fields, and AI Botanist chat fully functional. No critical issues found.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. This is a React Native Web deprecation warning - does not affect functionality
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Minor deprecation warning - functionality not affected

action_items: All new features working correctly - ready for production
Optional: Replace deprecated shadow* props with boxShadow in StyleSheet definitions
Optional: Update pointerEvents usage to style.pointerEvents
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ PUT /api/garden/{plant_id}/care endpoint working correctly - updates care fields and persists data
✓ POST /api/chat endpoint successfully integrates with Straico API (GPT-4o-mini)
✓ GET /api/chat/{plant_id}/history endpoint returns chat history correctly
✓ Frontend tabbed interface (About, Health, Care, Issues) implemented correctly with proper navigation
✓ Care tab shows all 6 editable fields (soil, light, temperature, water, repot cycle, prune cycle)
✓ Edit modal functionality working - opens, allows editing, saves, and closes properly
✓ AI Botanist chat screen loads with welcome message, accepts user input, and displays AI responses
✓ Chat history loads correctly and displays previous conversations
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for reliable testing
✓ Navigation between screens working correctly (Garden → Plant Detail → Chat → Back)
✓ Straico API integration working (returns 201 Created, properly handled)
✓ Care field updates persist correctly (verified via GET after PUT)
seed_data_creation: Using existing test user (test@leafcheck.com / test123) and existing plant (cf32e356-b052-4414-9699-1579ef1aa7d8). Chat history created during testing is visible in chat screen.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Backend has comprehensive pytest coverage for care update and AI chat endpoints (12 new tests). Frontend tested via Playwright - tabbed plant detail UI, care field editing with modal, and AI Botanist chat screen all functioning correctly. Straico API integration working perfectly with GPT-4o-mini model. Quick prompts in chat hidden by design when chat history exists (correct behavior). Minor React Native Web deprecation warnings present but do not affect functionality.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All features working as expected.
